headerDisplay: Control your Clearlight/Jacuzzi infrared saunas via local LAN. Saunas are auto-discovered on your network.

discoveryTimeout.title: Discovery Timeout (seconds)
discoveryTimeout.description: How long to listen for sauna responses during each discovery scan.

discoveryInterval.title: Discovery Interval (seconds)
discoveryInterval.description: How often to scan for new saunas on the network.

minTemp.title: Default Minimum Temperature (Celsius)
minTemp.description: Default minimum target temperature for discovered saunas.

maxTemp.title: Default Maximum Temperature (Celsius)
maxTemp.description: Default maximum target temperature for discovered saunas (66C = 150F).

devices.title: Pinned Saunas
devices.description: Manually configure saunas by IP address. Leave empty to use auto-discovery only.

host.title: IP Address
host.description: Static IP address of the sauna.

minTemp.title: Minimum Temperature (Celsius)
minTemp.description: Override default minimum temperature for this sauna.

maxTemp.title: Maximum Temperature (Celsius)
maxTemp.description: Override default maximum temperature for this sauna.
